programme.title: Super Kudumbam
programme.desc: Arun pretends to be married in order to get a house for rent. He picks Shanthi, an uncouth slum girl, to act as his wife. Eventually, circumstances change and they get actually married.

programme.title: Irandu Mugam
programme.desc: Parthasarathy dreams of becoming a minister. With the help of a local leader, he becomes an MLA and also conducts a few shady deals. It is IAS officer Sarveswaran, his secretary, who has other plans.

programme.title: Moive - Sonnalthan Kaadhala
programme.desc: Roja Works At A Finance Company And Her Colleague Murali Is Madly In Love With Her. However, Roja Rejects His Proposal As She Is The Sole Breadwinner Of Her Big Family.

programme.title: Ezhaiyin Sirippil
programme.desc: Ganesan is a bus driver. Kousalya, the daughter of his boss slowly falls for him. But she is shocked when she sees him being accused by a mentally ill woman who holds him responsible for her state.

programme.title: Ninaithen Vanthai
programme.desc: A musician dreams of a beautiful girl and sets out to find her. Soon after, he meets her at a wedding, but by that time his father has already fixed his marriage with someone else.

programme.title: Nandavana theru
programme.desc: Seenu, an orphan and a thief, forms a bond with a wrongly convicted man in the prison and decides to unite him with his niece. Little does he know his life is going to change forever.

programme.desc: After a lot of persuasion, Devaki agrees to marry Ravi. However, the marriage becomes a bitter struggle for her when she comes to know that Ravi is a drunkard and a womaniser.

programme.title: Sangamam
programme.desc: After a few casual confrontations, a classical dancer and a rural folk artist fall in love with each other. However, the girl's father who disregards folk arts opposes their relationship.

programme.title: Manmatha Leelai
programme.desc: Manmatha Leelai is a 1976 Indian Tamil-language romantic comedy film written and directed by K. Balachander.

programme.title: Simmaraasi
programme.desc: A man's campaign against the caste system earns him much respect from the villagers. Years later, his son who has joined the village goon returns from the city with an arrest warrant for his father.

programme.desc: Khushboo faces several difficulties when she tries to discipline a group of youngsters who are idlers and always cause huge embarrassment to their families.

programme.desc: Muthu, a village chief, adopts Rosa, an orphan, and takes care of her. When Rosa gets married to Kattalai, Muthu tries to cause problems for the couple.

programme.desc: After a lot of persuasion, Devaki agrees to marry Ravi. However, the marriage becomes a bitter struggle for her when she comes to know that Ravi is a drunkard and a womaniser.

programme.title: Sangamam
programme.desc: After a few casual confrontations, a classical dancer and a rural folk artist fall in love with each other. However, the girl's father who disregards folk arts opposes their relationship.

programme.title: Manmatha Leelai
programme.desc: Manmatha Leelai is a 1976 Indian Tamil-language romantic comedy film written and directed by K. Balachander.

programme.title: Simmaraasi
programme.desc: A man's campaign against the caste system earns him much respect from the villagers. Years later, his son who has joined the village goon returns from the city with an arrest warrant for his father.

programme.title: Thulli Thirintha Kaalam
programme.desc: Khushboo faces several difficulties when she tries to discipline a group of youngsters who are idlers and always cause huge embarrassment to their families.

programme.title: Movie Contd - Thulli Thirintha Kaalam
programme.desc: Khushboo faces several difficulties when she tries to discipline a group of youngsters who are idlers and always cause huge embarrassment to their families.

programme.title: Sengaathu
programme.desc: Two closely related families fall apart over a member of one family giving witness against a person belonging to the other in a murder trial. Their relationship deteriorates further from there.

programme.title: Senthooram
programme.desc: Muthu, a village chief, adopts Rosa, an orphan, and takes care of her. When Rosa gets married to Kattalai, Muthu tries to cause problems for the couple.

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: Fillers

programme.title: Chocolate
programme.desc: Aravind, a college student, falls in love with the newcomer Anjali, unaware that she is the daughter of the commissioner of police and his acquaintance, Jayachandran.

programme.title: Movie - Endrum Anbudan
programme.desc: Thyagu, a singer and music instructor, lives as a tenant where a young woman is a co-tenant. Their lives change when Thyagu shares shocking information about his past.

programme.title: Therkku Theru Machan
programme.desc: Subramani loves Parimala, who is from a different village. Devraj, who wants to marry Parimala, tries to separate the lovers. When all fails, he succeeds in forming a rivalry between the two villages.

programme.title: Ranga
programme.desc: Ranga, who was once a nice man, plans to kidnap a young boy while Raju, a former crook, decides to protect him. However, things change when their shared past is revealed.

programme.title: Thiruvilayadal Arambam
programme.desc: Guru hatches several plans to separate Priya and her lover Thirukumaran. However, each time Thirukumaran successfully manages to escape from Guru's evil plans and traps him in another problem.

programme.title: Aasal
programme.desc: Two brothers envy their step-brother Shiva as he is their father's favourite. Since their plan to deal in drugs and arms is opposed by Shiva, the two brothers hatch a devious plan to bump him off.

programme.title: Movie Contd - Aasal

programme.desc: Raised as a single child, Bhoomi longs for a joint family's loving embrace and heart-warming bond. And when her dream comes true, watch her battle all odds and win over her husband's large family.

programme.title: Bhairavi
programme.desc: Born to a loving mother, Shivagami, and an evil father, Ashok, Bhairavi grows up to be a brave girl with abundant love and a divine grace. What happens when she faces with treachery & betrayal from the family?

programme.title: Moodu Mullu

programme.title: Bhamalu Satyabhamalu

programme.title: Kottaga Rekkalochenna
programme.desc: Kaveri's life has been a whirlwind of problems, betrayal & heartbreak until she crosses paths with Arjun. But things take an unexpected turn when Arjun's mother approaches Kaveri to heal the rift with her son. What does the future hold for Kaveri?

programme.title: Chattambipaaru
programme.desc: Born into a humble, rustic background burdened by familial & financial struggles, Parvathi takes it upon herself to leave home & fearlessly pursue a better life for her family. Watch as she bravely faces the odds of life with an unwavering spirit.

programme.title: Peythozhiyaathe
programme.desc: Exuding warmth & courage, self-reliant Charulatha, living with an estranged father and a cruel stepmother, longs for a loving bond to escape her home. Will she find the love she seeks?

programme.title: Mangalyam Thanthunanena
programme.desc: Bold and compassionate Nidhi finds happiness in making others happy. Circumstances lead to her tying the knot with a good friend & love of her life, Gowtham. With conspiracies within the family vying to break them apart, will true love prevail?

programme.title: Swayamvarapanthal
programme.desc: Nandini, a stunning village girl, works tirelessly out of deep devotion to her family. Meanwhile, fuelled by lingering resentment, Surya despises his mother & wilfully bonds with Nandini causing strife. Watch what destiny unfolds for Nandini & Surya

programme.title: Hridayam
programme.desc: In an unhappy marriage with a vicious wife, Dr.Niranjan's sole joy is his daughter Shruthi. While Sudhi & Devika believe they've found their soulmate in each other. But fate places them in a complex web of relationships when the couples cross paths.

programme.title: GULF TODAY
programme.desc: GULF TODAY

programme.title: Myna
programme.desc: Born into a humble & rustic background troubled by familial & financial concerns, Myna takes it upon herself to leave home & fearlessly pursue a better life for her family. Watch her bravely face the odds of life with unwavering spirit.

programme.title: Nandini
programme.desc: Nandini is a supernatural drama series. The story is about a rich influential family haunted by a snake's curse and how a good spirit helps the family from the snake by its supernatural powers.

programme.title: Shambavi

programme.desc: King Pashupathy tries to fix his daughter's problem by making her talk. He meets a saint and a witch, who try to help him.

programme.title: Kanteerava
programme.desc: Kanti is raised like a son by a rich landlord and does odd jobs at his house. The landlord's daughter loves Kanti. But when Kanti returns from Kerala, he is accompanied by a mentally challenged girl.

programme.title: Madhesha
programme.desc: Young Madesh lands in prison after killing a man for abusing his mother. Once released, he goes to the city and turns into a powerful gangster working under Sircar.

programme.title: Movie -Hrudayavantha
programme.desc: Vishnu, a poor man, loves his sister and helps her become a doctor. However, Anu is suspicious about her brother's source of income and decides to investigate.

programme.title: Anuragada Alegalu
programme.desc: A singer falls in love with a girl at a party, not knowing that she is the one who is writing him anonymous love letters. However, their lives turn upside down when he is diagnosed with blood cancer.

programme.title: Premada Uyyale
programme.desc: Cast - Ananthu & Vijayakashi

programme.title: Benki
programme.desc: Cast - Umesh, Pramila Joshaya & Manu

programme.title: Super Songs
programme.desc: SuperSongs

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Movie -Time Bomb
programme.desc: Movie starring by Vishnu Vardhan, Soumya Kulkarni, Puneet Issar and directed by Joe Simon.

programme.title: Sathyadev IPS
programme.desc: Satyadeva, a virtuous policeman, marries the single mother of a girl. After losing his wife, with his step-daughter in tow, he sets out to find the ones responsible for his beloved's death.

programme.title: Upendra Matte Baa
programme.desc: When Prema prays for her dead husband Upendra's help during a family crisis, Upendra's soul is sent back to Earth by Lord Yama in order to fix his son's marital life.

programme.title: Swabhimana
programme.desc: Vijay is a rich man who has no interest in looking after his father's business. He falls in love with Vani, an intelligent woman, who tries to bring about a change in him.

programme.title: Vajrakaya
programme.desc: Viraj, an orphan adopted at a young age, discovers that his mother and grandfather are still alive. Soon, he embarks on a journey to meet his mother, who lives under the tyranny of her father.

programme.title: Nee Nanna Gellare
programme.desc: Srikanth meets Hayavadana Rao at a sports club and forges a friendly and competitive relationship with him in order to get closer to his daughter, Nalini, and woo her.

programme.title: Bhootayyana Maga Ayyu
programme.desc: Following the death of his ruthless landlord father, Ayyu earns the wrath of his villagers. But his biggest enemy is Gulla, who tries to stand against him in order to protect the locals.

programme.title: Nidhi
programme.desc: Movie starring Arjun, Devaraj, Tennis Krishna and is directed by Radhakrishna Bokka.

programme.title: Super Songs
programme.desc: SuperSongs

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Avane Nanna Ganda
programme.desc: Baloo, a cartoonist, falls in love with Mangala, who aspires to become a doctor. He attempts to express his feelings and win her heart in midst of her pursuance of her dream.

programme.title: Munjane
programme.desc: Manu and Pavithra, without having met, become fond of each other by exchanging notes on a bus travelling to each other's city. Later, Pavithra gets married off to a rich man, unaware that he is Manu.

programme.title: Gowdru
programme.desc: Ramegowda dotes on his sister, Gowri, and will go to any extent to keep her happy. When her jealous husband tries to separate them, things get out of control.

programme.title: Drama
programme.desc: Venkata, a young student, falls in love with his classmate, Nandini. One day, she kisses Venkata and in return asks him to take revenge on the principal for slapping her in front of everyone.

programme.title: Vijaya Dashami
programme.desc: A wealthy kind hearted landlord who is very happy about the return of his son from the oversees. His happiness comes to an end when the hidden truth about his 6 year old daughter who is come down to meet her grand parents is revealed to them

programme.title: Hendithghelthini
programme.desc: Jayaram adopts a child and is excited to surprise his wife by revealing the truth later. However, problems arise when he goes home to find another child, claiming to be his friend's daughter.

programme.title: Devi Bhagamma
programme.desc: Cast - Vishwas Bharadwaj, Sridhar & Sangeetha

programme.title: Rajanna
programme.desc: Rajanna, an orphan who is raised by his uncle, falls in love with Suma, his uncle's daughter. However, things turn awry when Suma meets with an accident.

programme.title: Super Songs
programme.desc: SuperSongs

programme.title: Nimma Adbutha Samaya
programme.desc: Namma Adbutha Samaya

programme.title: Kass Iddone Boss
programme.desc: A man strongly believes that money is everything in life and will do anything to earn it. Soon he lands in trouble due to negative thinking.

programme.title: Arjuna
programme.desc: Arjuna, a young cop, sets out to avenge the death of his wife who gets killed by influential people. Later, he discovers that his seniors were involved in the crime, which leaves him further enraged.

programme.title: Rishi
programme.desc: Rishi, who hails from a rich family, shows interest in one of the spoilt brats in the college, where he is a trustee. He continues to protect him in spite of opposition.

programme.title: Eetu Ediretu
programme.desc: A brave young man decides to put an end to the evil tricks of a wicked warlock, who has been exploiting innocent people.

programme.title: Sipayi
programme.desc: Sipayi, who fights for the welfare of the people in his village, falls in love with Shanti. When she is forced to marry a criminal, he tries to change her fate.

programme.title: Soundarya
programme.desc: Soundarya film is the upper middle class family story who is an industrialist, his wife and daughter are dragged in the mafia land dealings.But he want to lead a peaceful life.mafia threaten the life.Finally, he involves in a criminal action innocently.

programme.title: Lakh Takar Lokkhi Labh
programme.desc: This is an exclusive game show for women, where contestants can win cash prizes in various exciting games. Each episode's winner is rewarded with a grand cash prize of one lakh rupees. The show aims to help fulfill the dreams of women across Bengal.

programme.title: Balak Gopal
programme.desc: Balak Gopal

programme.title: Bhalobashar Rong Route
programme.desc: Raised by hardship, Rupai grips the bus wheel with defiance. Scarred by betrayal, Rehan dons a nurse’s whites with quiet pride. Two souls’ shared fight for identity stands united in a relentless challenge to society’s gender norms.

programme.title: Lakh Takar Lokkhi Labh
programme.desc: Lakh Takar Lokkhi Labh

programme.title: Sohage Adore
programme.desc: Surya marries his maid, Sohag, ruining his mother’s plans for an affluent match. As tensions rise, Sohag faces hostility from all sides. Surya’s devotion to her lights the way for their journey of love and healing in a broken family.

programme.title: Roopmati
programme.desc: Roopnagar's princess Roopmoti is the jewel of her people. Cast into exile, she finds herself guided by unseen powers & bound to a destiny greater than the crown she lost. Watch her rise to protect her kingdom from the dark forces of evil.
